name: Mnemonic
description: Mnemonic is a single-edition generative artwork stored entirely onchain. The contract holds the complete WebGL source code and an HTML renderer, making the piece permanently accessible from the blockchain without external dependencies. A built-in marketplace allows the owner to list the work for sale or accept bids, with configurable royalties paid to the artist on every sale.
about:
## About the artpiece

Mnemonic (2024) is a one-of-one generative work by Han Saglam, realized entirely within an Ethereum smart contract. The piece renders an interactive three-dimensional environment through WebGL shaders that responds to the viewer's gesture — inviting a shift in perspective through direct manipulation. Both the source code and its HTML renderer are stored permanently onchain, making the work self-contained and independent of any external infrastructure. Mnemonic reflects Saglam's ongoing inquiry into digital permanence and the blockchain as artistic medium, foregrounding absence and presence as a conceptual axis.

## About the artist

Han Saglam is an artist pioneering the world computer as an artistic medium, working through generative systems, smart contracts, data, and machine intelligence. His practice concentrates on autonomous systems and digital permanence — exploring how code functions as art. Works held in permanent collections at LACMA and Dataland Museum, and pieces have exceeded estimates at Sotheby's and Christie's.

## Built-in marketplace

The contract includes a native marketplace for trading the artwork. The owner can list it for sale at a fixed price (publicly or to a specific address), and anyone can place bids. A configurable royalty percentage is paid to the royalty recipient on every sale or accepted bid. Sale proceeds and outbid returns are credited to pending withdrawals and must be claimed manually.
risks: No upgradeability — contract logic is permanent and cannot be patched
ETH withdrawal pattern — sale proceeds and returned bids must be manually withdrawn via withdraw()
Royalty enforcement only applies to the built-in marketplace — external transfers via transferOwnership bypass royalties

MANIFEST.title: Manifest
MANIFEST.description: The artist's statement for the work: "Absence as presence."

artpiece.title: View Artpiece
artpiece.description: Returns the full HTML document that renders the generative artwork. Open in a browser to experience the piece.

CORE.title: Source Code
CORE.description: The complete JavaScript source code that powers the generative artwork. Stored permanently onchain.

owner.title: Owner
owner.description: The current owner of the artwork.

royaltyPercentage.title: Royalty Percentage
royaltyPercentage.description: The percentage of each sale paid as a royalty to the royalty recipient.

royaltyRecipient.title: Royalty Recipient
royaltyRecipient.description: The address that receives royalty payments from marketplace sales.

currentOffer.title: Current Offer
currentOffer.description: Check whether the artwork is currently listed for sale, at what price, and to whom.

toAddress.label: reserved for
toAddress.description: If set, only this address can buy. Zero address means open to anyone.

currentBid.title: Current Bid
currentBid.description: Check the current highest bid on the artwork.

buyNow.title: Buy Now
buyNow.description: Purchase the artwork at the listed price. The piece must be currently listed for sale, and the exact asking price must be sent as ETH.
buyNow.intent: Buy Mnemonic for the listed price
buyNow.warning: Sends ETH. The exact listed price must be sent — no more, no less.

placeBid.title: Place Bid
placeBid.description: Place a bid on the artwork. Must be higher than the current bid. Your ETH is held in the contract until the bid is accepted or you withdraw it.
placeBid.warning: Your ETH will be locked in the contract until the owner accepts or you withdraw.

acceptBid.title: Accept Bid
acceptBid.description: Accept the current highest bid. The artwork is transferred to the bidder and the bid amount (minus royalty) is credited to the owner's pending withdrawals. Only the owner can call this.

withdrawBid.title: Withdraw Bid
withdrawBid.description: Withdraw your active bid, returning your locked ETH. Only the current bidder can call this.

listForSale.title: List for Sale
listForSale.description: List the artwork for sale at a fixed price, open to anyone. Only the owner can call this.

listForSaleToAddress.title: List for Sale (Private)
listForSaleToAddress.description: List the artwork for sale to a specific address only. Only the owner can call this.
listForSaleToAddress.intent: List Mnemonic for sale at {salePriceInWei} to {toAddress}

toAddress.label: buyer
toAddress.description: Only this address can purchase the artwork

cancelFromSale.title: Cancel Sale
cancelFromSale.description: Remove the artwork from sale. Only the owner can call this.

withdraw.title: Withdraw ETH
withdraw.description: Withdraw ETH owed to you from sales or returned bids.

pendingWithdrawals.title: Pending Withdrawals
pendingWithdrawals.description: Check the amount of ETH an address can withdraw from sales or returned bids.

transferOwnership.title: Transfer Ownership
transferOwnership.description: Transfer the artwork to another address without going through the marketplace. Bypasses royalties. If the new owner has an active bid, it is refunded. Any active sale listing is canceled.
transferOwnership.warning: This is a direct transfer with no payment involved. Royalties are not collected. Make sure you intend to send the artwork for free.

setRoyaltyRecipient.title: Set Royalty Recipient
setRoyaltyRecipient.description: Change the address that receives royalty payments. Only the current royalty recipient can call this.

ArtpieceCreated.title: Artpiece Created
ArtpieceCreated.description: Emitted when the contract is deployed and the artwork is created.

ArtpieceTransferred.title: Artpiece Transferred
ArtpieceTransferred.description: Emitted when ownership of the artwork changes.

ListedForSale.description: Emitted when the artwork is listed for sale.

SaleCompleted.description: Emitted when the artwork is sold via buyNow.

SaleCanceled.description: Emitted when a sale listing is canceled.

BidPlaced.description: Emitted when a bid is placed on the artwork.

BidAccepted.description: Emitted when the owner accepts a bid.

BidWithdrawn.description: Emitted when a bidder withdraws their bid.

NotOwner.title: Not Owner
NotOwner.description: Only the current owner can perform this action.

NotRoyaltyRecipient.title: Not Royalty Recipient
NotRoyaltyRecipient.description: Only the current royalty recipient can change the royalty address.

NotForSale.title: Not for Sale
NotForSale.description: The artwork is not currently listed for sale.

ListedForSaleToSpecificAddress.title: Private Sale
ListedForSaleToSpecificAddress.description: The artwork is listed for sale to a specific address only. You are not the designated buyer.

InsufficientFunds.title: Insufficient Funds
InsufficientFunds.description: The amount sent does not match the required price, or the bid is not higher than the current bid.

NoBid.title: No Bid
NoBid.description: There is no active bid to accept.

NotYourBid.title: Not Your Bid
NotYourBid.description: Only the current bidder can withdraw their bid.

NullAddress.title: Null Address
NullAddress.description: Cannot transfer ownership or set royalty recipient to the zero address.

RoyaltyTooHigh.title: Royalty Too High
RoyaltyTooHigh.description: Royalty percentage must be less than 100%.

FundsTransfer.title: Funds Transfer Failed
FundsTransfer.description: ETH transfer failed. Ensure the recipient address can receive ETH.
